title: Baseline operation test
description: Validates nominal system operation under normal conditions

title: Positioning degradation test
description: Simulates degraded positioning and checks safe operation for 30 seconds

title: Communication loss detection test
description: Simulates communication loss and validates degraded mode entry

title: Sensor disagreement simulation
description: Simulates inconsistent sensor values and checks safe mode behavior

title: Telemetry recording test
description: Checks whether telemetry is recorded during operation
